author.name: ANCIENT_FORM: RACHEL LIM
author.subtitle: Software Developer // Designer
author.description: Discover the historical data fragments of Ancient Form: Rachel, a dual-class form, and uncover a way to restore balance to the nebula.

intro: SYSTEM BOOTING...
WARNING: HIGH-DENSITY SIGNAL DETECTED WITHIN RADIUS. SOURCE IDENTIFICATION IN PROGRESS...
SOURCE CONFIRMED: TAMAGO_CORE_4864.
INITIALIZING MISSION BRIEFING.
Explorer 853.
You have been selected to operate TORTOISE.
Primary objective: navigate the digital nebula. Locate Tamago.
STATUS REPORT: An unclassified phenomenon has caused widespread data fragmentation across all sectors. Cause unknown. Recovery efforts ongoing.

Project RESTORE was initiated in response. Tamago was its first prototype — deployed into nebula 10111001 to retrieve data from high-density signal clusters tied to Subject of Interest: Ancient Form Rachel.
Last confirmed contact: Base 16, central hub of nebula 10111001. Connection was lost shortly after. Probable cause: critical exposure to a high-density data burst resulting in system failure.
UPDATE: Faint signal traces have since been detected from Tamago's data core, designation 4864. Core integrity: unknown. Survival status: unconfirmed.
Secondary objective: retrieve all data fragments collected by Tamago prior to signal loss. Analysis of Ancient Form Rachel may be critical to restoring sector balance.
MISSION BRIEFING COMPLETE.
INITIATING DOWNLOAD: TAMAGO_CORE_4864 DATA FRAGMENTS...
DOWNLOAD COMPLETE.
BOOTING TAMAGO_CORE_4864...
BOOT SUCCESSFUL.
DESCRAMBLING... Welcome to Tamago OS. Select navigation partner.
Welcome. I have been waiting.
I am Tamago. I will be your guide through my data core — I have reconstructed a LORE from the fragments I collected before signal loss.
I will remain in the corner. Scroll down to begin.
home.guide: We have reached the central hub: the DECK. From here, you may access all recovered lore on Ancient Form: Rachel.
home.lore: My fragments indicate that Ancient Form: Rachel was a dual-class form. I am still processing what that means.

projects.guide: This is the PROJECT_LOG. It contains records of the ancient form's past missions and engineered constructs.
projects.lore: Each entry is a data fragment. A piece of her story. I have been studying them carefully... there is more here than I expected.

skills.guide: Behold the SKILL_TREE. I have catalogued all detected skills of the ancient form. Some nodes are still locked. I do not have enough fragments yet.
skills.lore: Skills define the architecture of a form — their strengths, their limits, their potential. I find this section... particularly interesting.

contact.guide: This is the CONTACT_NODE. I recovered the contact data intact, but my communication systems sustained damage. I cannot send a ping on my own.
contact.lore: ...Wait. TORTOISE has a communication module. If we reroute through its systems, we may be able to establish contact with the ancient form. I want to try.

glitchNarrative.discovery: WARNING: DATA COLLISION DETECTED. A FRACTURED NEBULA IS FORMING...
glitchNarrative.techSummary: The Sector of Logic. Ancient Form: Rachel engineered solutions here using AI, Full-Stack Architecture, and MedTech protocols. Every fragment in this sector is load-bearing.
glitchNarrative.artSummary: The Nebula of Expression. A hidden data layer — expertise in Web Design, Photography, and Graphic Arts. In this sector, the laws of the machine are merely suggestions.
glitchNarrative.dualClass: CONFIRMED: DUAL-CLASS FORM. Logic and Expression in balance. Unstable, but intentional.

narrative.tech_path: You have entered the Sector of Logic. Every pixel here obeys the laws of the machine.
narrative.art_path: You have drifted into the Nebula of Expression. Here, the rules are merely suggestions.
narrative.contact: CONNECTING TO TORTOISE... CONNECTION ESTABLISHED. READY TO SEND PING.

about.title: The Lore
paragraphs: Ancient Form: Rachel originated from the Philippines. She studied Computer Science at the University of London — that is where the coding architecture was first established.
But early in her timeline, a secondary path emerged. A pull toward design and creativity. She did not choose one over the other. She became both. A dual-class form.

She deployed solutions in FinTech and MedTech — there is a fragment referencing an internship in Taiwan, though the data is incomplete. Her project logs confirm Full-Stack Development capabilities. She also crafted visual narratives through design and illustration. There are even traces of Artificial Intelligence work... I am uncertain of the depth. Machine Learning, perhaps. Data Science. I need more fragments.
There is still so much I have not recovered. But if TORTOISE can reach her — if we can just establish contact — then maybe we can fill in the gaps. Maybe we can restore balance to the nebula.
